text: I find myself on the threshold between two kinds of spaces: one, a glass-enclosed room alive with the presence of people engaged in learning or discussion; the other, an exhibit space adorned with the symbols and language of research and development. I feel a sense of intellectual stimulation, my curiosity piqued by the fusion of human interaction and technological advancement. There is something comforting and exciting about being in a place that honors dialogue and innovation. It stirs within me questions about the evolving relationship between mind, machine, and society.
